title: The world's largest shrimp was caught #ai #aivideo #fishing #record #creature #animals
description: The world's largest shrimp was caught #ai #aivideo #fishing #record #creature #animals
prompt_text: A surreal and slightly unsettling scene on the wet deck of a fishing vessel under a grey, overcast sky. The focal point is a monstrously large, tiger-striped prawn, nearly the size of a human, lying on the deck. Three fishermen in heavy-duty waterproof gear are present: one in a vibrant orange suit crouches over the creature, another in yellow stands further back, and a third in red stands near the railing. The deck is cluttered with ropes, a green tub, and fishing equipment. The atmosphere is cold and damp, with the ship's metal structures and a crane arm visible against the horizon.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A surreal and slightly unsettling scene on the wet deck of a fishing vessel under a grey, overcast sky. The focal point is a monstrously large, tiger-striped prawn, nearly the size of a human, lying on the deck. Three fishermen in heavy-duty waterproof gear are present: one in a vibrant orange suit crouches over the creature, another in yellow stands further back, and a third in red stands near the railing. The deck is cluttered with ropes, a green tub, and fishing equipment. The atmosphere is cold and damp, with the ship's metal structures and a crane arm visible against the horizon.

cinematography.mood: Surreal, gritty, and awe-inspiring, blending industrial fishing aesthetics with a cryptozoological feel.
cinematography.cameraShot: Low-angle, wide-angle shot that emphasizes the massive scale of the prawn. The camera slowly pans around the orange-clad fisherman as he interacts with the creature.

actions: A fisherman in a bright orange waterproof suit and blue gloves crouches over a giant prawn.
He uses his hands to inspect the prawn's legs and underbelly, moving his hands along its length.
The prawn's legs twitch slightly as the fisherman touches them.
A fisherman in a yellow suit stands in the background, observing the scene.
A fisherman in a red suit stands by the railing on the left side of the frame.
The camera pans slowly from right to left, capturing the full scale of the giant crustacean and the wet deck environment.
dialogue: [Ambient sounds: The rhythmic mechanical hum of the ship, the splashing of water against the hull, and the whistling of wind.]
